proposals.summary: Promote repeated guidance into a governed procedural pattern: Use concise bullet points and visible checklists in summaries.
proposals.rationale: Rules-only reviewer saw 2 successful feedback traces pointing to the same active guidance. This is stable enough to propose as a reusable procedural pattern.

promotions.summary: accepted proposal: Promote repeated guidance into a governed procedural pattern: Use concise bullet points and visible checklists in summaries.
promotions.rationale: proposal passed the deterministic policy gate; procedural proposal has repeated successful feedback lineage over one active guidance memory; repeated explicit feedback confirms existing guidance strongly enough for deterministic procedural promotion
